mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_IP_AUTH_LOG (session_id, uis_code, client_ip, action, book_id, created_at) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{uisCode}, #{clientIp}, #{action}, #{bookId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, uis_code, client_ip, action, book_id, created_at FROM TBL_IP_AUTH_LOG WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
